steps.title: Read the control clue
steps.content: The company already controlled 85% of California's railways, then strengthened its position by completing a major transcontinental route to Southern California. The blank must describe an already powerful position in rail access.

steps.title: Reject unrelated nouns
steps.content: B suggests inventiveness, not control. C means unimportance, which contradicts the 85% figure. D means impartiality or lack of alignment, which does not fit a company expanding its strong rail position. The needed word means controlling power or supremacy. The answer is A.
